I am Hyomin Han. I am interested in Human-Computer Interaction, Speculative Design Research, Human-AI Co-Creative Systems, and Accessibility.

I am a prospective PhD applicant for Fall 2023.

News

Aug 2022 🥳 🥳 Yay I got invited as a special lecturer at Kyushu University! I’ll be having a lecture on Understanding the Korean Culture and the Korean Content Industry Through KPOP in November!
Aug 2022 ✈️ 🌏 Hello world! Finally opened my website. Excited to connect with you all!

Miscellaneous

In my free time, I listen to music, dance 💃 to my favorite songs, and play the piano 🎹.
